title: braya pilosa
intro: Braya pilosa, also known as Arctic bittercress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Braya pilosa can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote digestive health and reduce stress.
